summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SEO Engine multi-tenant app - iteration 3. All key features working correctly: article preview modal with SEO metadata (meta_description, tags, slug, focus_keyword), ConfigurationPage refactored tabs, login flows, and API endpoints.

minor.issue: Client login (cliente@noleggiosalerno.it) password may differ from expected 'password123' - skipped test

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login (admin@seoengine.it / admin123) - working
Backend: GET /api/articles/{id}/full returns complete article with seo_metadata (meta_description, tags, slug, focus_keyword)
Backend: GET /api/articles list with status filter
Backend: GET /api/clients/{id} and client configuration
Backend: PUT /api/clients/{id}/configuration - save configuration
Backend: GET /api/clients/{id}/combinations - keyword combinations
Backend: POST /api/verify-admin-password (seo_admin_2024) - working
Backend: POST /api/verify-prompt-password - working
Backend: GET /api/stats/overview - dashboard stats
Backend: GET /api/llm-providers - returns 4 providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek, Perplexity)
Frontend: Login flow with admin credentials - working
Frontend: Dashboard shows stats (1 client, 1 article)
Frontend: Articles page with article table
Frontend: Article actions dropdown (Anteprima, Apri in WordPress, Elimina)
Frontend: Article preview modal opens correctly via loadArticlePreview(article.id)
Frontend: SEO Metadata section in preview modal displays meta_description, focus_keyword, tags, slug
Frontend: ConfigurationPage tab navigation - all 6 tabs work (API Keys, Knowledge Base, Tono & Stile, Keywords, SERP Analysis, Prompt Avanzato)
Frontend: ApiKeysTab - LLM provider select, model select, API key input, WordPress config, Apify toggle
Frontend: AdvancedPromptTab - password-protected area visible
Frontend: Save and Save & Generate buttons present
critical_code_review_comments: useEffect hooks in ArticlesPage.jsx, ClientsPage.jsx, SessionHistoryPage.jsx have missing dependencies - add eslint-disable comments or fix
JWT key warning - HMAC key is 26 bytes, recommended 32 bytes minimum for SHA256 security

success_rate.backend: 100% (18 passed, 1 skipped - client login password unknown)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI flows and integrations working

seed_data_creation: Existing article 'Noleggio Auto Economico A Salerno' with SEO metadata used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Article preview modal correctly calls /api/articles/{id}/full endpoint to get SEO metadata. ConfigurationPage.jsx has been refactored into 6 sub-components in /pages/configuration/. All tabs work correctly. Admin login requires 'seo_token' localStorage key (not 'token'). Article has seo_metadata with meta_description, focus_keyword, tags, and slug.

key_fix_verified.issue: ArticlesPage.jsx Anteprima button was calling setPreviewArticle(article) instead of loadArticlePreview(article.id)
key_fix_verified.fix_confirmed: loadArticlePreview now correctly calls /api/articles/{id}/full to fetch SEO metadata

seo_metadata_shown.meta_description: Noleggio auto economico a Salerno. Prenota ora il tuo veicolo a prezzi competitivi.
